message:
test(fj-conformance): add 26 oracle tests for Reciprocal primitive

Comprehensive conformance tests for Primitive::Reciprocal (1/x):
- Basic positive: reciprocal(2)=0.5, reciprocal(4)=0.25, reciprocal(10)=0.1
- Fractions: reciprocal(0.5)=2, reciprocal(0.25)=4
- Negative values: reciprocal(-x) = -reciprocal(x)
- Zero: reciprocal(+0)=+inf, reciprocal(-0)=-inf
- Infinity: reciprocal(+inf)=+0, reciprocal(-inf)=-0
- NaN propagation
- Very small/large magnitudes (1e-100, 1e100)
- 1D, 2D, 3D tensor shapes
- Mathematical identities:
  - reciprocal(reciprocal(x)) = x
  - x * reciprocal(x) = 1
  - reciprocal(-x) = -reciprocal(x)

Previously only 2 tests existed in lax_oracle.rs.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
